# Expected Visual QA Notes

For `no-template-brief.json`, a strong deck plan should:

- choose a restrained visual concept for an executive operating review;
- use repeated layouts instead of one-off slide compositions;
- place the decision and KPI variance early;
- keep root-cause evidence visual and concise;
- move dense backup evidence to appendix slides;
- require screenshot export and review before claiming the deck is ready;
- call out that true render, PDF export, and text-bound checks require PowerPoint COM.
